staticText: Payslip drafting context. Use only earnings, reimbursements, employer contributions and deductions that the user has already confirmed from an approved payroll record. Do not calculate or verify PAYE, pension, social contributions, deduction authority, legal compliance, payment, remittance, filing, authenticity or employer approval. Keep employee details private and local, and require the relevant authority or qualified payroll professional to review statutory treatment before the draft is issued or relied on.
